tasks.baba:check: deno run --allow-read @mewhhaha/baba/cli check experiments/baba/grammar.baba --name duck_contextual_lexer --root document --metadata experiments/baba/metadata.json
tasks.baba:generate: deno run --allow-read --allow-write @mewhhaha/baba/cli generate experiments/baba/grammar.baba --name duck_contextual_lexer --root document --target all --metadata experiments/baba/metadata.json --out build/baba
tasks.baba:tree-sitter: deno task baba:generate && cd build/baba && tree-sitter generate grammar.js
